title: EUREKA — pancake hoard found!
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, third child, second sister, second ginger, second jack russell
prompt: Medium shot in @BedroomSisters. @Sara opens the trundle drawer, revealing pancakes scattered everywhere with @Ginger curled on top, mouth full of pancake. @Eva: "Really?! Really-really-really-really?!" @Ginger sheepish: "Woof?"
